fear_email.subject: Hey {name}, your {company} is losing money every month...
fear_email.body:
Hi {name},

I've been researching {company} and noticed something that might be costing you serious money.

[INSERT YOUR FEAR CONTENT HERE]

The reason I'm reaching out is because your company looked like a perfect fit based on what I found.

Want to know what I discovered?

[Your name]
CEO, PARWA
fear_email.description: Fear email - shows the problem/loss. YOU customize this content.

solution_email.subject: Re: Hey {name}, your {company} is losing money every month...
solution_email.body:
Hey {name},

Great to hear back from you!

[INSERT YOUR SOLUTION CONTENT HERE]

Here's how PARWA solves this:
- Handles 60-90% of your support tickets automatically
- Learns your business in weeks 1-6
- Integrates with your existing tools (Zendesk, Intercom, etc.)

You can see exactly how much you'd save here:
[Your calculator URL]

Want me to walk you through it?

[Your name]
solution_email.description: Solution email - sent after positive reply. YOU customize this content.

follow_up_email.subject: {name}, {company} - I messaged you before about your loss...
follow_up_email.body:
Hi {name},

I sent you a message earlier about the loss {company} is facing.

I personally (CEO of PARWA) messaged you because I thought you're the perfect match - your company's loss could be covered by us.

[INSERT ENHANCED FEAR CONTENT HERE - specific problems you found]

[INCLUDE SOURCE - e.g., "I found your info from LinkedIn where you're hiring support roles..."]

Whatever you think - just reply me. Yes or no, doesn't matter.

- [Your name], CEO
follow_up_email.enhanced_fear: [Your enhanced fear content - more specific, more personal]
follow_up_email.description: Follow-up email - sent manually after 36 hours no reply. Includes CEO personal touch and source reference.

tips: Use name + company + money loss in fear subject for 90% open rate
Follow-up subject: name + company first, then 'messaged before'
Include source (LinkedIn, job posts) in follow-up to avoid scam feel
CEO signature in follow-up builds trust
